name: Ear Wax Wieners on Cotton Swabs
recipeInstructions: Melt the butter or margarine in a small pan over low heat. Be careful not to burn it. Brush the cooked frankfurters with the melted butter, then broil them until evenly browned, turning them 2 or 3 times. While the franks are cooking, combine the mustard and mayonnaise in a small bowl. This mixture will serve as the "ear wax." Arrange the cooked frankfurters on a serving platter. Pierce each frank with a toothpick, then dip the end of each pick into a wet cotton ball. Place the bowl of ear wax in the center of the platter, surrounded by the franks.
